text.title: Supabase RLS Audit Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Supabase RLS Audit Checklist methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Every table in the `public` schema MUST have RLS enabled (rls_enabled=true). Tables exempt MUST be explicitly listed in the audit with a documented reason.

rationale.source: Supabase RLS docs + community incident reports

rule.rationale: Default-off RLS is the leading cause of Supabase data leaks; default-on is the safe posture.

rule.statement: Each table MUST declare policies for every USED verb (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE). Missing verb = no access; UNUSED verbs should be denied explicitly.
rule.rationale: Permissive defaults bite during refactors; explicit policy-per-verb makes the access matrix auditable.

rule.statement: Test fixture with ≥2 tenants MUST prove the `anon` role canNOT SELECT rows belonging to tenant_b when authenticated as tenant_a. Fixture-driven test is the binary check.
rule.rationale: Policies that look right but leak under join/subquery edge cases get caught only by fixtures.

rule.statement: RlsAuditReport names a single owner. 'team' / 'we' / '' are forbidden.
Audit MUST execute the fixture-driven test in a real Postgres (CI or clone), capture pass/fail, and record the row counts. Untested policies are not audited.
rule.rationale: Visual review of policies misses subtle bugs; running fixtures is proof.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-supabase-rls-audit-checklist.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
